name: Chicken Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 head of broccoli, cooked until tender
1 package Noodles Romanoff, follow the directions on the package
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Add all ingredients to a large baking dish, mixing well.
3. Bake for approximately 30 minutes or until browned.
